---
title: "DMRCate code"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-10-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Running DMRCate and Saving the results
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  Enrichment analysis for ALL phenotypes using existing CSVs
#  (no .RData load/save; loops over any / ln / dist)
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(DMRcate)
  library(data.table)
  library(minfi)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

# --- CONFIG ---
results_root <- if (exists("results_root")) results_root else "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
phenotypes   <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
DMR_FDR_THRESHOLD <- 0.05
DMR_MIN_CPGS      <- 3

###############################################################################
# Function: load_annotation_auto()
# Dynamically loads Illumina annotation (EPIC or 450K) — no beta matrix required
###############################################################################
load_annotation_auto <- function() {
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(minfi))
  
  # Try EPIC first (newer platform)
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    )
    msg("✓ Using Illumina EPIC annotation (hg19).")
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    
  # Fallback to 450k if EPIC not available
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
    )
    msg("✓ Using Illumina 450K annotation (hg19).")
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
    
  } else {
    stop("❌ No Illumina methylation annotation package found. Install EPIC or 450K.")
  }
  
  msg("✓ Loaded annotation with ", nrow(a), " CpGs.")
  return(a)
}

# --- Call it once at the start of the script ---
anno <- load_annotation_auto()

###############################################################################
# 1) Enrichment plotting function (unchanged, except bigger figure + linewidth)
###############################################################################
run_enrichment_analysis <- function(sig_probes,
                                    universe_probes,
                                    anno_df,
                                    output_file,
                                    plot_title = "",
                                    plot_subtitle = "") {

  # Filter annotation to only probes in our universe
  anno_universe <- anno_df %>%
    dplyr::filter(probeID %in% universe_probes)

  final_universe_probes <- anno_universe$probeID
  final_sig_probes      <- intersect(sig_probes, final_universe_probes)

  n_sig <- length(final_sig_probes)
  n_univ <- length(final_universe_probes)

  if (n_sig < 10) {
    msg("  [WARNING] Too few significant probes (", n_sig, ") for enrichment. Skipping plot.")
    return(NULL)
  }

  all_regions <- unique(anno_universe$region)

  enrich_results <- purrr::map_dfr(all_regions, function(current_region) {
    probes_in_region <- anno_universe %>%
      dplyr::filter(region == current_region) %>%
      dplyr::pull(probeID)

    A <- sum(final_sig_probes %in% probes_in_region)
    C <- n_sig - A
    B <- length(probes_in_region) - A
    D <- n_univ - (A + B + C)

    test <- fisher.test(matrix(c(A, C, B, D), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

    tibble(
      region = current_region,
      OR     = as.numeric(test$estimate),
      CI_low = test$conf.int[1],
      CI_high= test$conf.int[2],
      p_value = test$p.value
    )
  })

  region_order <- c("N Shelf", "N Shore", "CpG Island", "S Shore", "S Shelf", "Open Sea")
  enrich_results$region <- factor(enrich_results$region, levels = region_order)

  p <- ggplot(enrich_results, aes(x = region, y = OR)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high), width = 0.1, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black") +
    geom_point(size = 3, shape = 18, color = "black") +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.25, 2.25)) +
    labs(y = "Odds ratio", x = "") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x  = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
      plot.title   = element_blank(),
      plot.subtitle= element_blank()
    )

  ggsave(output_file, p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
  msg("  ✓ Enrichment plot saved → ", output_file)
  invisible(enrich_results)
}

###############################################################################
# 2) Prepare annotation table for island context (unchanged)
###############################################################################
anno_clean_df <- as.data.frame(anno) %>%
  dplyr::select(probeID = Name, region = Relation_to_Island, chr = chr, pos = pos) %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(region), !is.na(probeID)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(region = dplyr::recode(region,
    "Island"   = "CpG Island",
    "N_Shore"  = "N Shore",
    "S_Shore"  = "S Shore",
    "N_Shelf"  = "N Shelf",
    "S_Shelf"  = "S Shelf",
    "OpenSea"  = "Open Sea"
  )) %>%
  dplyr::distinct(probeID, .keep_all = TRUE)
msg("Annotation prepped (", nrow(anno_clean_df), " CpGs retained).")

###############################################################################
# 3) Build the probe GRanges (with cgID names) ONCE
#    Prefer myAnno@ranges if present; else build from manifest
###############################################################################
if (exists("myAnno") && inherits(myAnno@ranges, "GRanges")) {
  all_probes_gr <- myAnno@ranges
  # If names are missing or look like coordinates, (re)map to cgIDs by ±2bp
  need_map <- !length(names(all_probes_gr)) ||
              all(grepl("^chr", head(names(all_probes_gr), 50), perl = TRUE))
  if (need_map) {
    msg("  [INFO] Mapping probe ranges to cgIDs (±2 bp) using manifest (myAnno present).")
    gr_df <- as.data.frame(all_probes_gr) %>%
      dplyr::transmute(chr = as.character(seqnames),
                       pos = as.numeric(start))
  } else {
    msg("  [INFO] Using cgID-named probe ranges from myAnno.")
  }
} else {
  msg("  [INFO] myAnno not available → building probe ranges from manifest.")
  # Construct GRanges directly from annotation manifest
  gr_df <- anno_clean_df %>%
    dplyr::transmute(chr = as.character(chr),
                     pos = as.numeric(pos),
                     probeID = probeID)
  all_probes_gr <- GRanges(seqnames = gr_df$chr,
                           ranges   = IRanges(start = gr_df$pos, width = 1))
  names(all_probes_gr) <- gr_df$probeID
  need_map <- FALSE
}

# If we need to map cgIDs onto all_probes_gr (names missing / coordinates), do it once
if (exists("gr_df") && need_map) {
  anno_lookup <- anno_clean_df %>%
    dplyr::select(chr, pos, probeID)

  data.table::setDT(anno_lookup)
  x_dt <- data.table::data.table(chr = gr_df$chr,
                                 start = gr_df$pos - 2,
                                 end   = gr_df$pos + 2,
                                 idx   = seq_len(nrow(gr_df)))
  y_dt <- data.table::data.table(chr = anno_lookup$chr,
                                 start = anno_lookup$pos,
                                 end   = anno_lookup$pos,
                                 probeID = anno_lookup$probeID)
  data.table::setkey(x_dt, chr, start, end)
  data.table::setkey(y_dt, chr, start, end)
  mapped <- data.table::foverlaps(x_dt, y_dt, type = "any", nomatch = 0L)[order(idx)]
  mapped_unique <- mapped[!duplicated(idx)]
  names(all_probes_gr) <- NA_character_
  names(all_probes_gr)[mapped_unique$idx] <- mapped_unique$probeID
  keep <- which(!is.na(names(all_probes_gr)))
  all_probes_gr <- all_probes_gr[keep]
  msg("  [INFO] Successfully mapped ", length(keep), " probes to cgIDs.")
}

# Universe for enrichment
universe_list <- names(all_probes_gr)
msg("  [INFO] Universe–Annotation overlap: ",
    length(intersect(universe_list, anno_clean_df$probeID)), " probes shared.")

###############################################################################
# 4) Helper: read DMR CSV and make GRanges for hyper / hypo selections
###############################################################################
dmr_csv_to_gr <- function(csv_path, direction = c("hyper", "hypo")) {
  direction <- match.arg(direction)
  if (!file.exists(csv_path)) return(GRanges())

  x <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (!nrow(x)) return(GRanges())

  # Apply thresholds & direction
  x <- x %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      no.cpgs >= DMR_MIN_CPGS,
      min_smoothed_fdr < DMR_FDR_THRESHOLD,
      if (direction == "hyper") meanmeth.diff > 0 else meanmeth.diff < 0
    )

  if (!nrow(x)) return(GRanges())

  GRanges(seqnames = x$chr,
          ranges   = IRanges(start = x$start, end = x$end))
}

###############################################################################
# 5) LOOP: run enrichment for each phenotype using ONLY the CSV outputs
###############################################################################
for (pheno_tag in phenotypes) {
  msg("\n==============================")
  msg(">>> Running enrichment for phenotype: ", pheno_tag)

  dmr_dir  <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6", "DMRcate_Tier3")
  csv_path <- file.path(dmr_dir, "dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv")

  if (!file.exists(csv_path)) {
    msg("  [WARNING] DMR CSV not found → ", csv_path, " (skipping).")
    next
  }

  # Build GRanges from CSV for hyper & hypo
  gr_hyper <- dmr_csv_to_gr(csv_path, "hyper")
  gr_hypo  <- dmr_csv_to_gr(csv_path, "hypo")

  # Overlap probes (cgID-named) with phenotype-specific DMRs
  if (length(gr_hyper)) {
    ov_hyper <- findOverlaps(all_probes_gr, gr_hyper)
    probes_hyper <- unique(names(all_probes_gr)[queryHits(ov_hyper)])
    probes_hyper <- probes_hyper[!is.na(probes_hyper)]
    msg("  [DEBUG] Hyper probes captured from overlaps: ", length(probes_hyper))

    run_enrichment_analysis(
      sig_probes      = probes_hyper,
      universe_probes = universe_list,
      anno_df         = anno_clean_df,
      output_file     = file.path(dmr_dir, "enrichment_plot_DMR_HYPER.png"),
      plot_title      = "Enrichment (Probes in HYPER DMRs)",
      plot_subtitle   = glue("{pheno_tag} | {length(probes_hyper)} probes")
    )
  } else {
    msg("  [INFO] No hyper DMRs passing thresholds for ", pheno_tag, ".")
  }

  if (length(gr_hypo)) {
    ov_hypo <- findOverlaps(all_probes_gr, gr_hypo)
    probes_hypo <- unique(names(all_probes_gr)[queryHits(ov_hypo)])
    probes_hypo <- probes_hypo[!is.na(probes_hypo)]
    msg("  [DEBUG] Hypo probes captured from overlaps: ", length(probes_hypo))

    run_enrichment_analysis(
      sig_probes      = probes_hypo,
      universe_probes = universe_list,
      anno_df         = anno_clean_df,
      output_file     = file.path(dmr_dir, "enrichment_plot_DMR_HYPO.png"),
      plot_title      = "Enrichment (Probes in HYPO DMRs)",
      plot_subtitle   = glue("{pheno_tag} | {length(probes_hypo)} probes")
    )
  } else {
    msg("  [INFO] No hypo DMRs passing thresholds for ", pheno_tag, ".")
  }

  msg("✓ Enrichment analysis completed for: ", pheno_tag)
}

msg("\n✓ Enrichment analysis completed for all phenotypes.")
```


Generating the Genomic context plots for Figure 3D
```{r}
###############################################################################
# Combined enrichment plots for all phenotypes (any / ln / dist)
###############################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(DMRcate)
  library(data.table)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
central_plot_dir <- file.path(results_root, "DMRcate_Tier3")
dir.create(central_plot_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
DMR_FDR_THRESHOLD <- 0.05
DMR_MIN_CPGS <- 3

###############################################################################
# Helper: read DMR CSV and make GRanges
###############################################################################
dmr_csv_to_gr <- function(csv_path, direction = c("hyper", "hypo")) {
  direction <- match.arg(direction)
  if (!file.exists(csv_path)) return(GRanges())

  x <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (!nrow(x)) return(GRanges())

  x <- x %>%
    filter(
      no.cpgs >= DMR_MIN_CPGS,
      min_smoothed_fdr < DMR_FDR_THRESHOLD,
      if (direction == "hyper") meanmeth.diff > 0 else meanmeth.diff < 0
    )

  if (!nrow(x)) return(GRanges())

  GRanges(seqnames = x$chr,
          ranges   = IRanges(start = x$start, end = x$end))
}

###############################################################################
# Combined enrichment plotting function (PDF output for Illustrator)
###############################################################################
plot_combined_enrichment <- function(df_hyper, df_hypo, output_file) {
  df_hyper$type <- "Hyper"
  df_hypo$type  <- "Hypo"
  df <- bind_rows(df_hyper, df_hypo)

  y_max <- max(df$CI_high, na.rm = TRUE) + 0.5

  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = region, y = OR, color = type)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dotted", color = "black") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = CI_low, ymax = CI_high), width = 0.12, linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 3, shape = 18) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Hyper" = "red", "Hypo" = "blue")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, y_max)) +
    labs(y = "Odds ratio", x = "", color = "") +
    theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, angle = 0, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "top"
    )

  # --- Save as high-resolution PDF for Illustrator ---
  pdf_file <- sub("\\.png$", ".pdf", output_file)
  ggsave(pdf_file, p, width = 9, height = 6.5, device = cairo_pdf)
  msg("  ✓ Combined PDF plot saved → ", pdf_file)
}

###############################################################################
# Run for each phenotype
###############################################################################
for (pheno_tag in phenotypes) {
  msg("\n==============================")
  msg(">>> Running combined enrichment for phenotype:", pheno_tag)

  dmr_dir  <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}/H6/DMRcate_Tier3"))
  csv_path <- file.path(dmr_dir, "dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv")
  if (!file.exists(csv_path)) {
    msg("  [WARNING] No CSV found for ", pheno_tag, " → skipping.")
    next
  }

  # Build GRanges for hyper/hypo
  gr_hyper <- dmr_csv_to_gr(csv_path, "hyper")
  gr_hypo  <- dmr_csv_to_gr(csv_path, "hypo")

  if (!exists("all_probes_gr") || !exists("anno_clean_df")) {
    stop("Missing 'all_probes_gr' or 'anno_clean_df' — run mapping first.")
  }

  universe_list <- names(all_probes_gr)

  run_enrichment <- function(gr, label) {
    if (!length(gr)) return(NULL)
    ov <- findOverlaps(all_probes_gr, gr)
    probes <- unique(names(all_probes_gr)[queryHits(ov)])
    probes <- probes[!is.na(probes)]

    anno_universe <- anno_clean_df %>% filter(probeID %in% universe_list)
    all_regions <- unique(anno_universe$region)

    purrr::map_dfr(all_regions, function(current_region) {
      probes_in_region <- anno_universe %>%
        filter(region == current_region) %>%
        pull(probeID)

      A <- sum(probes %in% probes_in_region)
      C <- length(probes) - A
      B <- length(probes_in_region) - A
      D <- length(universe_list) - (A + B + C)
      test <- fisher.test(matrix(c(A, C, B, D), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE))

      tibble(
        region = current_region,
        OR = as.numeric(test$estimate),
        CI_low = test$conf.int[1],
        CI_high = test$conf.int[2],
        p_value = test$p.value
      )
    })
  }

  df_hyper <- run_enrichment(gr_hyper, "Hyper")
  df_hypo  <- run_enrichment(gr_hypo,  "Hypo")

  if (is.null(df_hyper) && is.null(df_hypo)) {
    msg("  [INFO] No DMRs found for ", pheno_tag, ".")
    next
  }

  combined_file <- file.path(central_plot_dir, glue("enrichment_combined_{pheno_tag}.png"))
  plot_combined_enrichment(df_hyper, df_hypo, combined_file)
}

msg("\n✓ Combined enrichment analysis completed for all phenotypes.")
```
